Motion To Disqualify Arb
Off Calendar Feb-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Peter J. Whalen, Esq. 981-5550 for petitioner & moving party; Steven H. Frankel, Esq. 882-2410 & Thomas A. Allen, Esq. 215/864-7000 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to disqualify granted.
Argued and the Court denies the motion to disqualify. Respondent to prepare order.
